title: angelonia minor
intro: Angelonia minor, also known as Angel's Trumpet, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its trumpet-shaped flowers and delicate foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of alkaloids, particularly angelicin and angelic acid. The health benefits of Angelonia minor include its potential to reduce inflammation, ease respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular remedy for colds, fever, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Angelonia minor can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
